subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of ‘Abdu'l-Bahá! The East is illumined, the West is perfumed, and the world is in motion and acceleration. The fame of the Grandeur of the Word of God
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
